title: Chip Stocks Rally in AI Trade Revival | The Close 7/6/2026
description: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are Morgan Stanley PWM Executive Director Katerina Simonetti, BlackRock Deputy CIO of Global Fixed Income Russ Brownback, Jefferies Equity Research Analyst David Chiaverini, Hamilton Lane Co-CEO Erik Hirsch, Wells Fargo Investment Institute Head of Global Investment Strategy Paul Christopher, Bokeh Capital Partners Founder & Chief Investment Officer Kim Forrest, US Chief Design Officer Joe Gebbia, Robinhood CEO Vlad Tenev, & Churchill Asset Management Vice Chairman & Chief Investment Strategist Randy Schwimmer. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: How Private Credit is Fueling the Buy-Now-Pay-Later Boom
description: On today’s Big Take podcast, we track how private credit is funding the Buy-Now-Pay-Later boom, what it means for borrowers and why the relationship is raising red flags. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Musk-Altman Judge Sends OpenAI Battle to Mediator
description: The judge overseeing the legal battle between Elon Musk and Sam Altman and their dueling AI startups enlisted a mediator to resolve the dispute.
